languages.text: "Это ж род Абеляра, сенешаля вашего, верно? Я тут наслушался про него. Ну, если родичи его такие же, честные, без комиссарской брехни, с ними можно иметь дело".
"That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."
languages.original_text: "Это ж род Абеляра, сенешаля вашего, верно? Я тут наслушался про него. Ну, если родичи его такие же, честные, без комиссарской брехни, с ними можно иметь дело".

traits.locale_text: "That's Abelard's family, your Seneschal, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap, then they're worth dealing with."
"That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."
"That's your Seneschal's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar words, then we'll be able to work together."
"That's Abelard's family, your Seneschal, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap, then they're worth dealing with."
"That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

languages.text: 「あなたの家臣の家族ですね。その男についてよく聞きました。もし彼の家臣が彼と同じように、正直で、コミッサールに媚びないなら、一緒に仕事ができるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar words, then we'll be able to work together."

languages.text: "Seneşaliniz Abelard'ın ailesi, değil mi? Kendisi hakkında çok şey duydum. Eğer klanı da onun gibiyse... Yani dürüstseler, komiser zırvalarına başvurmuyorlarsa o zaman birlikte çalışabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

traits.locale_text: "Seneşaliniz Abelard'ın ailesi, değil mi? Kendisi hakkında çok şey duydum. Eğer klanı da onun gibiyse... Yani dürüstseler, komiser zırvalarına başvurmuyorlarsa o zaman birlikte çalışabiliriz."

languages.text: “那是您的总领阿贝拉德的家族吧？我听说过他的不少事迹。好吧，如果他的族人都像他一样诚实，不说政委式的空话，那他们就值得打交道。”
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

traits.locale_text: “那是您的总领阿贝拉德的家族吧？我听说过他的不少事迹。好吧，如果他的族人都像他一样诚实，不说政委式的空话，那他们就值得打交道。”

languages.text: "Das ist die Familie Eures Truchsesses Abelard, oder? Ich habe viel von dem Mann gehört. Tja, wenn sein Clan ist wie er ... ehrlich, ohne großes Gehabe ... dann sollten wir uns mit ihm befassen."
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist die Familie Eures Truchsesses Abelard, oder? Ich habe viel von dem Mann gehört. Tja, wenn sein Clan ist wie er ... ehrlich, ohne großes Gehabe ... dann sollten wir uns mit ihm befassen."

languages.text: « C'est bien la famille de votre sénéchal ? J'ai beaucoup entendu parler de lui. Si les membres de son clan sont comme lui, alors nous devrions pouvoir nous entendre. Je dis ça en toute franchise, ce ne sont pas des paroles de commissaire. »
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

traits.locale_text: « C'est bien la famille de votre sénéchal ? J'ai beaucoup entendu parler de lui. Si les membres de son clan sont comme lui, alors nous devrions pouvoir nous entendre. Je dis ça en toute franchise, ce ne sont pas des paroles de commissaire. »

languages.text: «Esa es la familia de su Senescal, Abelard, ¿verdad? He oído mucho sobre él. Bueno, si su clan es como él, sincero y sin chorradas de Comisario, merece la pena tratar con ellos».
languages.original_text: "That's your Seneschal Abelard's family, isn't it? I've heard a lot about the man. Well, if his clan are like him — honest, with no Commissar claptrap — then they're worth dealing with."

traits.locale_text: «Esa es la familia de su Senescal, Abelard, ¿verdad? He oído mucho sobre él. Bueno, si su clan es como él, sincero y sin chorradas de Comisario, merece la pena tratar con ellos».
